final:
module shift_register(
    input clk,
    input load,
    input [3:0] d,
    output reg [3:0] q
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (load) begin
            q <= d;  // Load new data
        end else begin
            q <= {q[2:0], 1'b0};  // Shift left
        end
    end
endmodule
